name: environment_defense_subcontractor_routes_mesa_st_lt
premise: A heat dome forced rolling blackouts; a data center’s diesel reserves are contested against hospital backup priority. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment defense subcontractor routes mesa st lt has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as short term against long term; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mei Kaur
agents.identity: I am Mei Kaur, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fatima Chen
agents.identity: I am Fatima Chen, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so long term does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so short term does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Mei Kaur must choose under short term versus long term. What does Mei Kaur do?
